change: Rewrote shared.server.ts getCustomFieldsSchemas to use explicit try/catch cache-miss fallthrough instead of the fragile return-in-finally (no catch); audited all other consumers — already null-safe; confirmed no raw ioredis imports.
task: 1/2: Harden Redis cache consumers to treat null/miss as cache miss
assumptions: getCustomFieldsSchemas: the prior return-in-finally already swallowed JSON.parse throws (behavior was correct), so no behavioral regression test is possible; the change is a clarity/robustness refactor that preserves behavior, verified via typecheck+lint.
docs.ts (criterion 5) has no direct cache .get() read — it only uses redis through the resilience-wrapped Ratelimit — so no null-handling change was needed there.
settings/{documentPreview,labelLogo,backups,backups-archive}.server.ts match the *.server.ts glob but do not import redis, so they were out of scope.
